argument.script: async (globalVars) => { try { const limit = {{ limit }}; const maxPages = 5; const data = globalVars.extractData || []; globalVars.pageCount = (globalVars.pageCount || 0) + 1; if (data.length >= limit || globalVars.pageCount > maxPages) return false; const url = location.href; const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[data-component-type="s-search-result"]'); if (!cards.length) return { extractData: data, _log: 'no cards, url=' + url }; for (const card of cards) { const asin = card.getAttribute('data-asin') || ''; if (!asin || data.some(d => d.asin === asin)) continue; const title = (card.querySelector('h2')?.textContent || '').trim(); if (!title) continue; const href = card.querySelector('a.a-link-normal[href*="/dp/"]')?.href || ''; const priceEl = card.querySelector('.a-price .a-offscreen'); const price = priceEl ? priceEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const ratingEl = card.querySelector('[aria-label*="out of 5 stars"]'); const rating = ratingEl ? ratingEl.getAttribute('aria-label') || '' : ''; const reviewEl = card.querySelector('a[href*="#customerReviews"]'); const reviews = reviewEl ? reviewEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const sponsored = /sponsored/i.test(card.innerText || ''); const badges = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.a-badge-text')).map(n => (n.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean); data.push({ title: title.slice(0, 120), price, rating, reviews, asin, sponsored, badges: badges.join(', '), url: href }); } if (data.length >= limit) return { extractData: data }; const nextBtn = document.querySelector('a.s-pagination-next'); if (!nextBtn || nextBtn.classList.contains('s-pagination-disabled')) return { extractData: data }; nextBtn.click(); return { pageCount: globalVars.pageCount, extractData: data }; } catch(e) { return { extractData: [], _log: 'error: ' + String(e) }; } }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }}; const all = intermediate.extractData || []; const seen = new Set(); const deduped = []; for (const item of all) { if (!item.asin || seen.has(item.asin)) continue; seen.add(item.asin); deduped.push(item); } const items = deduped.slice(0, limit); for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) { items[i].rank = i + 1; } return {extractData: items}; }
